# Priyansh Singh Purawat — Full Stack Developer

> Portfolio of Priyansh Singh Purawat, a full-stack developer and BCA student at JECRC University (Jaipur, India) specializing in the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js) and modern full-stack web development.

Priyansh builds responsive, end-to-end web applications using React, Node.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and modern JavaScript tooling. Available for freelance and full-time opportunities.

## Pages
- [Home](/): Hero, full-stack overview, MERN expertise, about, selected projects, contact

## Focus areas
- Full-stack web development (frontend, backend, database, DevOps)
- MERN stack: MongoDB, Express.js, React, Node.js
- TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, modern React (hooks, server components)
- REST APIs, authentication, deployment
